title: Eight-Three
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Eight-Three
CT-014/783 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him{{StoryCite|story=Equipment (short story)|book=Star Wars: Short Story Collection}} |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Take care of the equipment, Eight-Three.''"
"''And the equipment will take care of us, Seven-Four.|Seven-Four and Eight-Three|}} '''Eight-Three''', designated '''CT-014/783''', was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He served as a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] on a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] along with [[Seven-Four]] during the [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|Battle of Haruun Kal]]. Eight-Three was commanded by [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|clone trooper lieutenant]] [[Four-One]] and 2nd Lieutenant [[CL-33/890]]. His gunship was assigned to the medium cruiser ''[[Halleck]]'' and sustained heavy damage during the action at Haruun Kal, though the ship endured and assisted with the rescue of stranded surviving [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]]. Eight-Three's turret was separated from his gunship during the battle. He drifted in space, with no method of propulsion. After the battle, he was recovered by his Gunship, and continued to serve the republic. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Equipment (short story)|book=Star Wars: Short Story Collection}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-014/783 |fi=CT-014/783 }} [[Category:Clone gunners]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
